summary: K9Command Booking Modification UI Testing - Iteration 20. All booking edit modal features tested and working correctly. Real-time price updates, add-on toggles, date changes, and save functionality all verified.

issues: Minor: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Edit Booking Modal correctly implements all required features: date fields, dog selection, add-on toggles, notes, and price preview
Real-time price calculation works correctly with proper delta display
Price delta shows 'Additional Amount Due' for increases and 'Refund Amount' for decreases
Add-ons correctly calculated: Separate Playtime at $6/night, Bath Before Pickup at $25/dog
dataClient.updateBooking() properly recalculates total and persists all fields to localStorage
Success toast correctly displays price delta message
seed_data_creation: Created test dog (Buddy) and booking via localStorage seeding for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking modification UI fully tested. App uses mock mode (localStorage) by default. BookStayPage uses backend API directly which doesn't work in mock mode - bookings must be seeded via localStorage for testing. Edit modal has data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.

customer_registration.details: New customer registration works correctly, redirects to dashboard

create_booking.details: BookStayPage uses backend API which doesn't work in mock mode. Bookings seeded via localStorage for testing.

edit_booking_modal.details: Modal opens correctly with all required fields

edit_modal_fields.date_fields: PASS - Check-in and Check-out date pickers present and functional
edit_modal_fields.dog_selection: PASS - Checkbox for each dog with name and breed displayed
edit_modal_fields.price_preview: PASS - Shows nights, base rate, add-ons, total, and delta

real_time_price_updates.toggle_separate_playtime: PASS - Price updates from $135 to $153 (+$18 for 3 nights)
real_time_price_updates.toggle_bath_before_pickup: PASS - Price updates to $178 (+$25 for 1 dog)
real_time_price_updates.change_dates: PASS - Extending from 3 to 5 nights updates price to $225

price_delta_display.increase: PASS - Shows 'Additional Amount Due' in yellow/warning style
price_delta_display.note: PASS - Shows '* Additional charges will be added to your account'

save_booking_changes.toast_message: Booking updated! Additional $120.00 has been added to your account.
save_booking_changes.data_persistence: PASS - localStorage updated with new dates, total, and add-on flags

mocked_apis.data_mode: MOCK - Frontend uses localStorage-backed mock data (REACT_APP_DATA_MODE=mock)
mocked_apis.booking_creation: BookStayPage uses backend API directly - doesn't work in mock mode
mocked_apis.booking_update: dataClient.updateBooking() works correctly in mock mode

test_flow_summary: 4. Opened Edit Booking Modal via edit icon
6. Toggled Separate Playtime - price updated to $153 (+$18)
7. Toggled Bath Before Pickup - price updated to $178 (+$43)
8. Changed checkout date (3→5 nights) - price updated to $225 (+$90)
9. Added Separate Playtime with extended dates - price updated to $255 (+$120)
10. Saved changes - success toast with price delta message
11. Verified booking list shows updated dates
